---
title: "Lady Margaret Hall"
---

## Lady Margaret Hall

**Type:** organization

### About

Founded as a hall for women students in 1879, with Elizabeth Wordsworth as its Lady Principal, it became a college of Oxford University in 1959. See www.lmh.ox.ac.uk

### Letters Mentioning This Organization

- [To Elizabeth Harcourt Mitchell, July 31, 1899.](../letters/3414_To_Elizabeth_Harcourt_Mitchell.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
